ddls:
CREATE TABLE "violations" (
  "violation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each violation */,
  "violation_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the violation occurrence */,
  "complaint_created" TEXT /* Date and time when the complaint was created */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the cities table */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the states table */,
  "area_code" INTEGER /* Area code of the phone number involved */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the subjects table */,
  "caller_id" TEXT /* Caller ID of the reported phone number */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number involved in the violation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the violation */,
  "recorded" TEXT /* Indicates if the violation has been recorded ('Yes' or 'No') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("violation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_violations_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_violations_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_violations_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the states table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cities_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subjects" (
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subject category */,
  "subject_name" TEXT /* Name of the subject (e.g., Spam, Scam) */,
  "subject_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the subject */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., consumer, regulator) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "complaints" (
  "complaint_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each complaint entry */,
  "violation_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the violations table */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the complaint (e.g., Open, Resolved) */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date when the complaint was resolved, if applicable */,
  "assigned_regulator_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table (assigned regulator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("complaint_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_complaints_violation_id FOREIGN KEY ("violation_id") REFERENCES violations ("violation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_complaints_assigned_regulator_id FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_regulator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_complaints_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "complaint_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment entry */,
  "complaint_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the complaints table */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment text */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was posted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_complaint_comments_complaint_id FOREIGN KEY ("complaint_id") REFERENCES complaints ("complaint_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_complaint_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "complaint_attachments" (
  "attachment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attachment entry */,
  "complaint_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the complaints table */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the attached file */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the attached file */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the attached file */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the attachment was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attachment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_complaint_attachments_complaint_id FOREIGN KEY ("complaint_id") REFERENCES complaints ("complaint_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regulator_actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each action entry */,
  "complaint_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the complaints table */,
  "regulator_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table (regulator) */,
  "action_taken" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date when the action was taken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regulator_actions_regulator_id FOREIGN KEY ("regulator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regulator_actions_complaint_id FOREIGN KEY ("complaint_id") REFERENCES complaints ("complaint_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "complaint_status_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "complaint_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the complaints table */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the complaint at a point in time */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date when the status was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_complaint_status_history_complaint_id FOREIGN KEY ("complaint_id") REFERENCES complaints ("complaint_id")
)
